CVE-2017-8372.title: The mad_layer_III function in layer3.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.1 ...
CVE-2017-8372.description: The mad_layer_III function in layer3.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.15.1b, if NDEBUG is omitted, allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and application exit) via a crafted audio file.

CVE-2017-8373.title: The mad_layer_III function in layer3.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.1 ...
CVE-2017-8373.description: The mad_layer_III function in layer3.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.15.1b allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (heap-based buffer overflow and application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted audio file.

CVE-2017-8374.title: The mad_bit_skip function in bit.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.15.1b ...
CVE-2017-8374.description: The mad_bit_skip function in bit.c in Underbit MAD libmad 0.15.1b allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (heap-based buffer over-read and application crash) via a crafted audio file.
